description: Round-1 machine-readable coverage ledger for AiUE test governance.

coverage_axes.summary: Kernel host minimum visual proof is covered by the current V1 latest report.
Demo host native control roundtrip is covered by the current E2/T2 request surface and latest demo evidence.
Current verification focuses on the two known ready bundles, not arbitrary bundle scale.
Two ready bundles are exercised, but broad character diversity is not yet established.
Weapon flow is proven on the current ready path, but not across a wider asset variety.
Clothing coverage exists, but it is still centered on the current hair fixture path.
FX coverage exists, but only on the current controlled fixture path.
Material and texture loading have not yet been promoted into the primary verified path.
The playable demo path is exercised through tests, but has not yet been manually validated as a played demo.
Action preview is proven on a fixed verified path, but broader action variation is not yet covered.
Animation preview is proven on selected presets, not across a wider animation family surface.
